discovery.run_summary: Risk-off tilt with VIX +7.3% as Iran-UAE attacks push oil to 4-year highs and broad equities slip. Key idiosyncratic stories: GameStop's audacious eBay bid (market skeptical), CHRW/SAIA hit by Amazon logistics expansion, and biotech bid via XBI +2.3%. Several mid-cap moves look catalyst-driven and rational, but CHRW/SAIA may be candidates for follow-up given sympathy dynamics.

notable_index_moves: VIX +7.3% to 18.23 on Iran-UAE attack headlines
XLI -1.14% on Amazon logistics announcement hitting freight names
XBI +2.34% notable biotech bid against weak tape
ORCL +4.95% standout mega-cap on AI/Anthropic-related enterprise news

discoveries.name: GameStop Corporation
discoveries.mechanism: Acquirer drawdown on surprise large M&A bid (GME bidding $55.5B for eBay) - prediction markets give only 15-25% odds of completion. Cash-and-stock structure dilutive risk plus combative CEO interview added uncertainty.
discoveries.catalyst: GameStop surprise takeover bid for eBay at $125/share; Cohen CNBC interview poorly received
research_pointers: Pro-forma balance sheet impact and cash component of the bid
EBAY share reaction as tell on deal probability
Whether GME has financing commitments or is using its own cash/stock
Historical pattern of Cohen-led M&A and shareholder approval mechanics
discoveries.what_would_falsify: EBAY board engagement, financing commitments disclosed, or prediction market odds rising materially above 30%

discoveries.name: C.H. Robinson Worldwide
discoveries.mechanism: Sympathy/competitive selling on Amazon opening logistics network to third parties. CHRW is a 3PL/freight broker, so Amazon-as-competitor narrative directly applies, but Amazon logistics-as-a-service has been telegraphed for years and CHRW's brokerage model differs from parcel. -14% over 5 days suggests cumulative damage may be overdone if fundamentals unchanged.
discoveries.catalyst: Amazon announces opening supply chain network to outside businesses; UPS/FedEx also down
research_pointers: Read CHRW's most recent 10-Q on customer concentration and brokerage vs asset-light exposure to Amazon-style services
Compare drawdown to UPS/FDX on relative basis - is CHRW overshooting?
Check if any Amazon announcement explicitly targets freight brokerage vs parcel/last-mile
Recent sell-side notes on Amazon logistics threat to 3PLs
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Amazon announcement explicitly includes truckload brokerage at scale, or CHRW issues guidance cut citing customer losses

discoveries.name: Saia, Inc.
discoveries.mechanism: Sympathy selling within freight on Amazon logistics news, but volume_multiple is only 1.05 - move on average volume suggests gradual, not panic. SAIA is LTL trucking, even further from Amazon's current parcel network than CHRW. The -8% with no above-average volume is a warning that algo/sector sweep is doing the selling.
discoveries.catalyst: Amazon logistics news driving freight sector weakness; XLI -1.14%
research_pointers: Whether Amazon's expansion includes LTL services explicitly
SAIA's recent earnings tone on tonnage trends and pricing
Check for any company-specific news (analyst downgrade, terminal closures)
Compare to ODFL, XPO peer group reactions
discoveries.what_would_falsify: SAIA-specific negative news (downgrade, guidance cut, customer loss), or evidence Amazon is entering LTL

discoveries.name: Axsome Therapeutics
discoveries.mechanism: +19% over 5 days with elevated volume into a strong XBI day suggests pipeline/data catalyst. No specific headline in feed - check for clinical trial readouts, label expansion, or M&A speculation given biotech bid tone.
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown specific catalyst; XBI +2.34% provides sector tailwind but stock outperforming sector materially
research_pointers: Look for recent Auvelity (depression) script trends or label expansion news
Pipeline updates on AXS-05, AXS-07, AXS-14
Any conference presentation slated this week
Short interest and recent analyst actions
discoveries.what_would_falsify: No identifiable catalyst found - if move is purely momentum/sympathy it's vulnerable to mean reversion

discoveries.name: UFP Industries
discoveries.mechanism: -16% over 5 days with elevated volume in a weak XLB tape (-1.38%) suggests company-specific headwind beyond sector. Lumber/wood production exposed to housing slowdown. Could be earnings reaction or guidance cut not in feed.
discoveries.catalyst: Not identified in news feed; possible earnings or housing data driver
research_pointers: Check for recent UFPI earnings release or pre-announcement
Lumber futures and housing starts data this week
Whether move is part of building-products sector weakness (compare to BLDR, BCC)
Any insider selling or analyst downgrades
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Confirmation of guidance cut or weak earnings would shift to LIKELY RATIONAL

discoveries.name: Alaska Air Group
discoveries.mechanism: Airlines hit by oil at 4-year high ($114) - jet fuel cost pressure. Counter-narrative: Spirit demise news was framed as positive for rival pricing power. ALK -8.6% over 5 days suggests oil/Iran fears dominating over Spirit-benefit story.
discoveries.catalyst: Oil +to $114 on Iran-UAE attacks; offset partially by Spirit collapse benefiting survivors
research_pointers: ALK's fuel hedging position from latest 10-Q
Routes overlap with Spirit (West Coast vs Spirit's national footprint)
Compare drawdown vs LUV, DAL, UAL to see if ALK is over- or under-reacting
Brent forward curve - is $114 priced as transitory or persistent?
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Oil retreats below $100 quickly; or ALK issues unit-revenue update reflecting Spirit benefit

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Amazon opens logistics network to third-party businesses
Iran attacks on UAE; oil tops $114 (4-year high)
GameStop bids $55.5B for eBay - market skeptical

trump_signals.post_summary: Trump again attacking Powell ('Too Late') over high interest rates
trump_signals.note: Recurring rhetoric; combined with Pirro abandoning Powell subpoena appeal headline, Fed independence pressure remains a slow-burn theme. Not a tradable catalyst alone, but worth monitoring if escalation occurs. Regional banks (KRE -1.17%) sensitive to rate path.

ai_announcements.headline: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
ai_announcements.summary: Sierra (Bret Taylor) raises near $1B to become standard for AI customer experiences

ai_announcements.headline: Anthropic and OpenAI both launching JVs for enterprise AI services
ai_announcements.summary: Both labs partnering with asset managers to push enterprise AI products. Flagging as Anthropic-related for bias grading.

ai_announcements.headline: DoorDash adds AI tools for merchant onboarding/photos/sites
ai_announcements.summary: DoorDash internal AI tooling for merchants

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: None of today's flagged stock moves map cleanly to today's AI announcements. CHRW (-9%) and SAIA (-8.2%) are freight/trucking — likely earnings or freight-cycle driven, not AI; no AI logistics announcement in the feed to justify sympathy AI-selloff narrative. GME -10% on 4x volume is idiosyncratic (no AI angle). UFPI -5.7% is lumber, unrelated. AXSM +8% is biotech, unrelated. MKSI +4% (semi cap equipment) could be AI-infra sympathy but no specific catalyst in feed. ALK -4% is airline, unrelated. Forcing AI narratives onto these moves would manufacture signal. Quiet night for AI-driven equity dislocations.
